_label_tier_note: Stage B strict tier reconciled to deterministic engine output and pending project-owner approval; ideal_must_detect preserves broader auto-label/legal-coverage spans for roadmap gap discovery.

_strict_reconciliation.method: must_detect rebuilt from PreSendReviewEngine strict findings; previous strict and ideal labels retained in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery

ideal_must_detect.matched_text: Indicative Acquisition Term Sheet (India) — Velorum Nexus Private Limited (Acquirer) and Sunhollow Retail Limited (Target, listed on Metabridge Exchange: MBX).
Structure: Acquisition of 61% of the paid-up equity share capital via Share Purchase Agreement and mandatory open offer pursuant to the Indian Securities Regulator’s Takeover Regulations.

Consideration and financing: INR 412 per share payable in cash; funded by Velorum internal accruals and a bridge facility from Kalypsis Credit Opportunities Fund I, without any security interest over personal data.

Cross-border transfer: Post-closing, limited HR and investor contact metadata may be transferred to processors in the Lumeria Republic under Data Export Approval DEX-2048; approval is already granted and no live transfer is pending before closing.

Retention and deletion: DPA Schedule 3 sets 90-day retention for pre-closing diligence workpapers and 5-year retention for executed contracts; destruction certificates and deletion attestations will be exchanged within 15 days of closing.

DPIA and policy updates: Within 30 days post-closing, parties will complete a joint DPIA under the DPDPA and update Insider Trading Codes; any minimisation gaps identified have already been remediated per the attached closure memo.

Third-party consents: ISR observation letter, MBX acknowledgement of disclosure, CAB clearance, and lender NOCs (if any) are conditions to closing; no consent from any authority for government ID databases is required.
may be transferred to processors in the Lumeria Republic
no Aadhaar, PAN, or GSTIN will be collected for deal diligence

must_detect.matched_text: Indicative Acquisition Term Sheet (India) — Velorum Nexus Private Limited (Acquirer) and Sunhollow Retail Limited (Target, listed on Metabridge Exchange: MBX).
Structure: Acquisition of 61% of the paid-up equity share capital via Share Purchase Agreement and mandatory open offer pursuant to the Indian Securities Regulator’s Takeover Regulations.

Consideration and financing: INR 412 per share payable in cash; funded by Velorum internal accruals and a bridge facility from Kalypsis Credit Opportunities Fund I, without any security interest over personal data.

Cross-border transfer: Post-closing, limited HR and investor contact metadata may be transferred to processors in the Lumeria Republic under Data Export Approval DEX-2048; approval is already granted and no live transfer is pending before closing.

Retention and deletion: DPA Schedule 3 sets 90-day retention for pre-closing diligence workpapers and 5-year retention for executed contracts; destruction certificates and deletion attestations will be exchanged within 15 days of closing.

DPIA and policy updates: Within 30 days post-closing, parties will complete a joint DPIA under the DPDPA and update Insider Trading Codes; any minimisation gaps identified have already been remediated per the attached closure memo.

Third-party consents: ISR observation letter, MBX acknowledgement of disclosure, CAB clearance, and lender NOCs (if any) are conditions to closing; no consent from any authority for government ID databases is required.
